headline: Bunge Global (BG) Upgraded to Strong Buy: What Does It Mean for the Stock?
summary: Bunge Global (BG) might move higher on growing optimism about its earnings prospects, which is reflected by its upgrade to a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).

headline: Barclays Maintains Overweight on Bunge Global, Raises Price Target to $150
summary: Barclays  analyst Benjamin Theurer   maintains Bunge Global (NYSE:BG) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $145 to $150.

headline: Bunge Global Q1 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Bunge Global (NYSE:BG) reported first-quarter 2026 results that topped management’s expectations, driven primarily by stronger performance in its soybean and softseed processing and refining businesses amid what CEO Greg Heckman described as a “very dynamic” and rapidly changing operating environmen
